name: Chelmsford Athletics Track
metaTitle: Chelmsford Sport & Athletics Centre | Info & Wind Speed
metaDescription: Check live wind speed and track information for the Chelmsford Sport & Athletics Centre at Melbourne Park.

trackInfo.heading: Opening Times
trackInfo.text: Mon–Fri 06:30–22:00, Sat–Sun 08:00–18:00. Note that the athletics track may be reserved for club sessions or events.

trackInfo.heading: Entry Price
trackInfo.text: Access is available via pay-as-you-go or various membership packages. Managed by Chelmsford City Council.

trackInfo.heading: Track Details
trackInfo.text: A premier 8-lane 400m floodlit track. The centre also features state-of-the-art indoor training facilities.

trackInfo.heading: Parking Details
trackInfo.text: Free on-site car parking is available for visitors, including dedicated accessible parking spaces.

trackInfo.heading: Website
trackInfo.text: Visit the official Chelmsford City Council page for CSAC for timings and facility bookings.
